$comment: Config-of-record for Railway service environment VARIABLE NAMES (never values) — incident 2026-07-10 follow-up (AUTH_COOKIE_SAMESITE was silently lost in a hand-rebuild of the service env; docs/ops/incident-2026-07-10-login-bounce-cross-site-cookie.md). The scheduled ops-synthetic-probe.yml workflow diffs each service's LIVE variable names against this manifest: a name listed in `expected` but missing live FAILS the probe (a var was lost — the July-10 class); a live name not listed here warns (update this manifest in the same change that adds the variable). RAILWAY_*-prefixed names are Railway-managed and ignored. `transitional` names are expected to disappear (warn while present, never fail): AUTH_COOKIE_SAMESITE is deleted by the ops-proxy-cutover.yml remove-samesite action once the same-origin proxy is live. Snapshot basis: live listing 2026-07-10 (ops-railway-diag runs 29072390863 / 29072395860).
